item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very unsettling. This one takes a bit to build up but it's definitely worth it. I like it. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is decently off-putting and genuine unnerving, I love it. You really get the sense of a low-level off-ness before before it all went gentle into that good night.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This creeped me out and I loved it. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really like everything past the description, it’s a nice creepy little story with a really good event log (love the slow realization that there is no bio relationship between the “daughter” and the parents). However the containment procedures and the description don’t feel fully developed(even with the in universe WIP), mainly because the “parents” connection to the weirdness isn’t mentioned at all. But then again that could ruin the build up to the event. Either way feels a bit underdeveloped so 8/10 event log 4/10 containment/description. I feel that even with the lacking start the end more then makes up for it! +1

item.title: Happy HORROR-days boils and ghouls!
item.content:encoded:
My girl, my girl, don't lie to me

Tell me where did you sleep last night

In the Pines', in the Pines'

Where the sun don't ever shine

I would shiver the whole night through

Dedicated to my sister's new fiancée. Welcome to the family!

(Skótos - Research and documentation is still in progress or severely lacking.)
